description: Replicate the classic 1973 Cooper & Shepard mental rotation study in PsychoPy Builder. Participants must judge if a rotated letter is normal or mirror-reversed using the conditions file provided at /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/mental_rotation/conditions.csv. The experiment must feature an instructions routine (specifying 'j' for SAME and 'f' for MIRROR), a fixation cross lasting 0.5-1.0s, a trial routine, and a final thank you message. Each trial must display an upright reference letter on the left and a probe letter on the right; the probe should be rotated according to the 'angle' variable and mirrored if the 'matchType' is 'mirror', using the 'letter' variable from the conditions. The system must record 'j' and 'f' keyboard responses and validate them against the 'corrAns' variable. Save the experiment file to /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/mental_rotation/mental_rotation.psyexp.
